title: clerodendrum costulatum
intro: Clerodendrum costulatum, also known as the Mountain Glory Bower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clerodendrum costulatum include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
